# adversarial_skill_parity/

Golden output parity fixtures for the three adversarial skill ports (decision-critic, deepthink, problem-analysis). Never edit by hand unless regenerating.

## Files

| File | What | When to read |
| ---- | ---- | ------------ |
| `decision-critic.json` | Expected structured output for the decision-critic port parity gate | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_adversarial_skill_parity.py` failures for decision-critic |
| `deepthink.json` | Expected structured output for the deepthink port parity gate | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_adversarial_skill_parity.py` failures for deepthink |
| `problem-analysis.json` | Expected structured output for the problem-analysis port parity gate | Regenerating fixtures, debugging `test_adversarial_skill_parity.py` failures for problem-analysis |
